text.zh: 1989 年，扬·勒昆及合作者展示了用反向传播训练卷积网络识别手写邮政编码的方法。
text.en: In 1989, Yann LeCun and collaborators demonstrated convolutional networks trained by backpropagation for handwritten ZIP-code recognition.

text.zh: 卷积网络通过局部连接和共享权重减少参数，并把特征提取与分类整合进一个端到端学习系统；这条路线后来发展为 LeNet-5。
text.en: Convolutional networks reduced parameters through local connections and shared weights while combining feature extraction and classification in one end-to-end learning system; the line later matured into LeNet-5.
